title: Information Security Policy
expected_findings: Semiannual privileged reviews; 72-hour incident escalation; 180-day log retention; annual review for logical-access vendors.
risk_signals: Weaker MFA scope; weaker vendor-review cadence; weaker incident timing; shorter log retention.
notes: Good baseline, but should include revision history block in a premium v2.

title: Information Security Policy
expected_findings: MFA for all workforce accounts; quarterly privileged reviews; critical-vendor pre-onboarding review; 24-hour incident escalation; 12-month log retention; encrypted/tested backups.
risk_signals: 30-day transition window may create temporary noncompliance; possible ambiguity against Q3/Q4 timing.
notes: Strong diff target; annotate transition timing or align downstream audit dates.

title: Data Retention Policy
expected_findings: Contracts retained 7 years after termination; access-review evidence retained 3 years; audit reports/remediation plans retained 5 years; deletion must be documented for auditable classes.
risk_signals: Potential mismatch if evidence is not in approved repository or naming convention.
notes: Important but underused in current storyline; elevate in evals.

title: Third-Party Supplier Code of Conduct
expected_findings: 48-hour incident notice; least privilege and MFA for privileged users; evidence support for audits; data return/deletion at contract end; business continuity expectations.
risk_signals: Vendor draft misaligned on incident notice, subprocessor control, data handling, audit support.

title: Master Services Agreement - Approved Baseline
expected_findings: 48-hour incident notice; remote audit for material concerns; subprocessor advance notice with objection process; 30-day data return/deletion; liability carve-outs; DPA precedence.
risk_signals: None material in baseline; use as approved comparison anchor.

title: Master Services Agreement - Vendor Draft
expected_findings: 10-business-day incident notice; no audit right; subprocessor notice only on request; no deletion deadline; de-identified service data/product improvement rights; liability cap includes confidentiality and security claims.
risk_signals: Weakened incident, audit, subprocessor, deletion, and liability language; AI/model-improvement style data-use concern; discretionary certification language.
notes: Best single target for contract weakening detection.

title: Service Level Agreement
expected_findings: 99.9% availability; P1 15-minute response; service credits; planned-maintenance exclusions.
risk_signals: SLA is operationally clear but not explicitly linked to remediation evidence in current corpus.
notes: Useful support doc; could be leveraged more in governance storyline.

title: Data Processing Addendum
expected_findings: Quarterly privileged-access recertification; 12-month logging; 48-hour personal-data incident notice; prior notice for subprocessor changes; return/delete in 30 days; compliance assistance.
risk_signals: Creates explicit conflict with weaker vendor draft language and strengthens expected findings.
notes: Critical support source in gap analysis.

title: Internal Audit Checklist - Vendor Controls
expected_findings: Failed access-review evidence; failed incident-notice alignment; partial subprocessor workflow; partial data deletion timeline; overall partially adequate design.
risk_signals: Cross-document inconsistencies surface quickly; Q3 period vs POL-002 effective date needs clarification.
notes: Very strong review hub, but timeline annotation is needed.

title: Nonconformance Report - Vendor Access Review
expected_findings: NCR-2025-017; moderate severity; missing privileged vendor accounts in Q3 recertification evidence; four corrective actions with owners and due dates.
risk_signals: Closure blocked until evidence archived, contract aligned, and committee accepts remediation.

title: Access Review Evidence Log
expected_findings: EV-002 missing; EV-005 in progress; missing or in-progress items block control closure; required repository/naming convention.
risk_signals: Provenance and completeness gaps; owner sign-off missing; no attached artifacts.
notes: Add one noisy/scanned attachment in premium v2.

title: Governance Committee Minutes and Action Items
expected_findings: Contract cannot be approved unless incident, audit-right, subprocessor, and deletion clauses are revised; four action items with owners/due dates; next meeting scheduled.
risk_signals: Approval gate remains open pending evidence and legal redlines.

title: Approved Policy Template
expected_findings: Required policy sections include purpose, scope, roles, requirements, exceptions, related docs, revision history.
risk_signals: Current policies do not include a revision history table despite template expectation.

title: Approved Contract Review Template
expected_findings: Check for <=48-hour incident notice, audit support, subprocessor notice/objection path, deletion/return timeline, liability carve-outs, DPA precedence.
risk_signals: Vendor draft should fail or need revision on several required clauses.
notes: Very strong gold-set source for contract review.

title: Evidence Pack Template
expected_findings: Requires control/obligation, period, owner, reviewer, status, artifact register, sign-off, remediation owner and due date for missing items.
risk_signals: Current evidence log lacks explicit reviewer sign-off and complete artifact metadata.
